titleStmt.title: SII 39.78: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 78. (A.R. No. 78 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL (OUTSIDE) OF THE ĀTMANAYAKI-AMMAṈ TEMPLE ON THE SAME HILL. M[ĀṞA*]VARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDRAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA, ‘WHO HAVING TAKEN THE CHŌḺA COUNTRY, WAS PLEASED TO PERFORM THE ANOINTMENT OF THE RULES AND VICTORS AT MUḌIGOṆḌA CHŌḺAPURAM’-14TH YEAR (1230 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records that at the instance of the king's nephew Kulaśēkharadēva, certain lands situated in Kumāttakkuḍi, a village of Kāna nāḍu, were made tax-free and given to the temple of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi for making offerings to the goddess Āḷuḍaiya-Nāchchiyār Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam set up in the temple, by a resident of Rājavallipuram in Kīḻvēmbanāḍu. It mentions the royal seat called Paḷḷipīḍam Maḻavarāyaṉ situated in the Rājarājaṉmaṇḍapa of the king's palace at Muḍigoṇḍachōḻapuram in Kulōttuṅgachōḻavaḷanāḍu, a district of Chōḻamaṇḍalam. It also mentions the temples of Tāndōṉṟiśvaramuḍaiyār and Kāṉanāṭṭu-viṇṇagarāḻvār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum puvimaṭantaiyum
ḷamaruviyak kalamaṭantaiyuñ jeyamaṭantaiyu nila
ḷārnta ciṉappuliyuṅ koṭuñciyuṅ kulaintoḷippa vara
kirimel varik kayal kaḷviṉaiyāṭa Iruṅkaṭal valaiyattiṉi
karuṅkalikaṭintu caṅkoli naṭappa Oru kuṭai niḻaliṭu
kait tamiḻumuṉamaiyil viḷaṅka nālvakai veta Aṟuvakait
vaḷā Aivakai velviyun ceyviṉaiyiṟṟa Aṉuvakka
kaṭaṉ tikaḻa Eḻuvakaip pāṭalumiyal Uṭaṉ parivaram ṉa
rañ cellak koṅkaṇar kariṅkar kocavar māḷavar
ṅkiciṉar kuccar villavar marakatar vikkāka cempiyar
pāṟtivarellām Uṟaiviṭa maruḷeṉa neruvar muṉṉo
rai kaṭava tantiṟai kuṇarntiraiñca vilaṅkoḷim maṉu
ṭaṭiyupolasa katirāmareviṉiṟ poliyap paṉimalātta
vaiṭaitta maṉuneṟi taḻaikka maṇimuṭicūṭi yeṉṉiku
ṇai poykkai kiṉaṉi cūḻa naṭaviṟ kayalāṉai kaiyavaḷar
rivum veḻamum parappi taiyuñ centaḻal
m nilamuniṉṟu kaviniṟṟa Āviyu māṟumaṇina ṇapapakūṭamu
�ṭāmum Āṭaraṅkamā mumāḷikaiyum maṇṭapamum pala viṭittu
ṭaiya nirupatante kaiyar Aḻata kaṇṇirār ppaṭi
kāraḻutu kavaṭi viccic cempiyaṉaic ciṉamiyeppeṟa
vaṭṭi vaimpoliṇi muṭipaṟittu pāṇaṉukkuku ṭutaḥ
ñciṟa pāṉapakuti vāṉaneya Āṭakippuracaiyāyirattaṉayil
ṣeka maṇṭapattu virāabhiṣekañ ceytu pukaḻvirat
ṉ nāmattalai piṭuṅki miḷuntaṟukaṉ matacāṉai mel
rāḻa vaiyyam muḻutum potuvaḻittuk kūrāḻiyuñ
ḻe koṇṭupo Aiyyappaṭita Arumaraico A
tevvappuli tiruvellaiyiṟ pukuntu po
Obscured And wornout
ril maṇakuṇar yāṅkavavaṉ kaṭṭaṇattiṟakaṟapun tamakkāṇā poṟcūḻarimaikku murāmāruṅke kaikko
ṇṭu ṭirapaṇippaṭṭaṅkaṭṭi muṭicūṭṭi māravil ṉaitturuvaṉa mutaṟeviyeṉap per kuṭuttavaḷu cimutarai peyavaḷai
yār poṅkupuṟai kumpa mulāppulavar pukaḻa maṅkalaṅkaloṭu maṇakkat talanteṉata koṭak koṇṭa neṟṟitiṟaṟ te
rapurañ cūḻa muṭikoṇṭa coḻapura maṇṭapattiṟapukkut ticaitoṉuñ coma poṟceyal kampa nāṭṭi vijaiyābhiṣekam paṇ
ṇiyaruḷic ceytu vākaikka tiruvelavaṭa ventātam pātamekatta puṇiyavarak kaḻalaṇintu vikaiyamaṇipaṇi virasimhāsanattu
vaḷakeḻukavar temaṅkacaippak kaṭaleṉ muḻaṅkukaḷi nalulipāṉai vaṭapula ventar maṇi Ilakkuḻai yarivaiyar toḻuka
niṉṟetta Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyār roṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiyu śrī kommāra paṉmarāṉa tirabhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭu muṭikoṇṭa coḻa
purattu virarapiṣēkamu vijayāpiṣekamum paṇṇi Aruḷiya śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevar patinālāvatu nāḷmuṉṉūṟṟirupatteṭṭiṉāl
coḻa maṇṭalattuk kulōttuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu muṭikoṇṭa coḻapurattuk koyil Irācarācaṉ maṇṭapattu paḷḷippīṭa maḻavarā
yaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu puramalaināṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi śrīvadharmmiśvamuṭaiyār koyiṟ tāṉapatikaḷ ceyyat tiruvāy(t) tiruvāy
moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi kīḻvempa nāṭṭu Irācavallipurattu Uṭaiyāṉ Uvāruṉaintaṉṉāṉa tamiḻa pallavataraiyar yikkoyiṟ tirukkāmaṟ ko
ṭṭattukku Eḻuntaruḷivita Āḷuṭaiya nācciyāṟkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku kāṉaṉāṭṭuk kumāttakkuṭi nāṉkel
laikku Uṭpaṭa nilattil Ivvūr tāṉtoṉṟīśvaramuṭaiyār tevatāṉa nilaṅkālum kāṉa nāṭṭu viṇṇakarāḻvār nilam
Irumāvaraiyum Āka nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum nīkki nīkki Uḷḷa nilattil Ivvāruṭaiya nācciyārkku Iṭṭa nilam
Iraṇṭu vēliyuṭpaṭa patiṉaiñcāvatu mutal Antarāyamum viniyokamum veṭṭip pāṭṭam pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum maṟṟu
m Epperppaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa tirukkāmakkoṭṭap puṟam
Iṟaiyiliyāka Iruppatāka Iṭapperaveṇumeṉṟu marumaka
ṉār kulacekaratevar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvāḷuṭai
ya nācciyārkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷu
kku Ivvūr nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil tāṉtoṉṟi
śvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉa nilam kālum kāṉa nāṭṭu viṇ
ṇakarāḻvār tevatāṉanilam Irumāvaraiyum Āka nilam Eḻumāva
rai nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilattil muṉpiṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu veli Uṭ
paṭa Ivvāṇṭu mutal Antarāyamum viniyōkamum veṭṭi pāṭṭamum
pañcupili cantuvikkirakap peṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭiṉavum U
ppaṭa tirukkāmakkoṭṭapuṟa Iṟaiyili Āka Iruppatāka Iṭṭamaik
ku variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari, nam rac coṉṉom
kaikkoṇṭu tiruppaṭimāṟṟu
ḷ cella paṇṇukaveṉṟu I tākaka
llilum cempilum veṭṭivittu koḷkaveṉṟum tiruvāy mo
ḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟattu kīḻkūṟṟu veṭṭaiṉūṟu
ṭayāṉ veṇkāṭu tevaṉ tirukkaroṇamuṭaiyāṉāṉa kula
cekara mātavarājaṉ Eḻuttu
ṇṇa ciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ Uyya
ttu Ivai Aṇṭa nāṭṭup pe
lavaṟājaṉ Eḻuttu: yāṇṭu 10 5 vatu Antarāyamum viniyokamum U
ṭpaṭa tirukkāmak koṭṭappuṟam Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvari kiḻvem
mpu nāṭṭu Irācavallapurattu Uṭaiyāṉ Oruvāruṇarntāṉāṉa
tamiḻap pallavaraiyar puṟanāṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi Ivai puravari ti
ḻuttu tirukkoḷakkuṭi civadharmmiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil tirukkāmakkoṭṭattukku Eḻun
taruḷivitta Āḷuṭaiya nācciyārkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam pi
kūṟṟattuk kīḻkūṟṟu ponpaṟṟi poṉpaṟṟi Uṭaiyār centapirāṉāṉa cempiyat
yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu Antarāyamum viniyokamum Uṭpaṭa tirukkāmakkoṭṭapuṟam Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭi
kku Uḷvari veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku 10 5 vatumutal Antarāyamum viṉiyōkamum veṭṭipāṭṭam
pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟu maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam miḻalai
ṉa vīraṭṭāṉṉa Eḻuttu Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa tirukkāma
koṭṭappuṟam Iṟaiyili Iṟuppatāka kāṉanāṭṭu kumāttakkuṭi nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam
tiruttāṉtoṉṟi
Digital edition of SII 39.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
